section.div: I'm Full-Stack Web Developer passionate for learning new concepts and technologies that can add value to the software projects I contribute to.
Personal portfolio built with Astro, React, GSAP, and TailwindCSS. Features orbital animations, i18n (EN/ES), dark mode, View Transitions, and project case studies.
